Quality Education.reasoning: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops basic language skills and cultural literacy (Target 4.7), which are core components of quality education.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reasoning: Conversational topics like '교통' (transportation) and '전화' (telephone) offer a minimal, indirect link to infrastructure (Targets 9.1, 9.c), but the course does not focus on infrastructure development.
